author: Ciprian-Florin Ifrim
name: 32.8M ByteJEPA Mamba-2 — JEPA + SIGReg + INT4/FP8 QAT + U-Net + Brotli
blurb: 10L 640d Mamba-2 SSM with LeWorldModel-style JEPA latent prediction, per-timestep SIGReg, relu² 4x MLP (every=2), factored tied embedding (336-dim), INT4+FP8 QAT, poly softcap, 8192 BPE. 32.8M eval params (4.1M JEPA discarded). Trained 100k steps (~2.7h) unconstrained. Sliding eval stride=16 T=1.02. First SSM+JEPA entry.
